---
title: "STA572:Time Series Analysis and Forecasting"
subtitle: "C3. Econometric Modeling"
format: 
  revealjs:
    chalkboard: true
    fontsize: 20pt
    css: mystyle.css
    slide-number: true
author: "Lecturer, Department of Statistics"
footer: "Asmui Rahim, STA572 , Oct 2025"
execute: 
  echo: true
  warning: false
---

## Forecasting Econometric in R
